caption: A news broadcast captures a scene within a legislative chamber featuring three men seated behind desks. One man wears a wide-brimmed straw hat, a brown garment, and a light blue face mask. Beside him, another man is dressed in a white short-sleeved shirt and a light blue face mask. A third man, positioned slightly forward, wears a red traditional cap and a light blue face mask. The background consists of green seating. On-screen text reads "NEWS NOW" and "JUSUN STRIKE," with a sub-headline stating "REPS URGE FG TO ENSURE SPEEDY RESOLUTION." The "plustv" logo appears on the right, and a website address, "Watch online on www.plustvafrica.com/liive-tv" in the first row and "Watch online on www.youtube.com/plustvafrica" in the second row, is displayed at the bottom. Across the sequence, the men remain relatively still, though the man in the straw hat slightly adjusts his posture and hand placement.
